execution_stages.description: Validate readiness and evidence before entering enforced pilot mode.
actions: Confirm promotion readiness artifact reports overall_ready and pilot_go_no_go=go.
Confirm latest release handoff is ready and latest drill status is pass.
Verify rollback guardrail thresholds and required checks from policy.

execution_stages.description: Operate promotion-aware governance gate in enforced mode with continuous telemetry review.
actions: Run promotion-aware threshold governance gate for threshold-affecting PRs.
Attach runbook and transition-pack artifacts to MONPOL evidence.

execution_stages.description: Rollback to advisory mode when any guardrail threshold is breached.
actions: Switch promotion active_mode to advisory and document rollback rationale.
Publish rollback evidence in MONPOL changelog and transition pack.
Open mitigation follow-up before re-attempting enforced pilot.

promotion_plan.description: Collect routing telemetry and drill evidence in advisory mode.
exit_criteria: no unresolved blocked handoff over rolling 7 days

promotion_plan.description: Enable breach-aware governance enforcement for threshold-affecting PRs.
exit_criteria: all breach PRs include mitigation acknowledgments and MONPOL linkage
